# Download M4 money supply

Downloads monthly M4 (broad money) amounts outstanding from the Bank of
England. Available from June 1982.

## Usage

``` r
boe_money_supply(
  from = "1982-06-01",
  to = Sys.Date(),
  seasonally_adjusted = TRUE,
  cache = TRUE
)
```

## Source

<https://www.bankofengland.co.uk/boeapps/database/>

## Arguments

- from:

  Date or character (YYYY-MM-DD). Start date. Defaults to
  `"1982-06-01"`.

- to:

  Date or character (YYYY-MM-DD). End date. Defaults to today.

- seasonally_adjusted:

  Logical. Return seasonally adjusted series (default `TRUE`) or
  non-seasonally adjusted (`FALSE`).

- cache:

  Logical. Use cached data if available (default `TRUE`).

## Value

A data frame with columns:

- date:

  Date. End of month.

- amount_gbp_m:

  Numeric. M4 amounts outstanding (millions of pounds).

## Examples

``` r
# \donttest{
boe_money_supply(from = "2000-01-01")
#> ℹ Downloading from Bank of England
#> ✔ Downloading from Bank of England [382ms]
```
